name: Bain & Company, Inc.
lede: Bain runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Gurugram, covering gbs and gcc/gic, built over 22 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Bain office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Bain & Company, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Bain runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Gurugram), covering gbs and gcc/gic. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: Bain's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Gurugram, spanning gbs and gcc/gic. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 27 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Bain operate in India?
faq.a: Bain operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Bain have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Bain's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and Gurugram.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Bain run in India?
faq.a: Bain runs gbs and gcc/gic centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Bain's India GCCs?
faq.a: Bain's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Bain's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 27 leaders at Bain's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
